name: Soruj Mahmud
title: Junior Frontend Developer
summary: Frontend Developer specializing in React and modern CSS. Passionate about building high-performance, visually appealing user interfaces and seamless user experiences.

projects.title: E-commerce Web Application
projects.description: Developed a full-featured e-commerce platform with responsive UI, product filtering, cart functionality, and secure authentication system.
features: Dynamic product listing and category filtering
Add to cart and cart management system

projects.title: Real-time Chat Application
projects.description: Built a real-time messaging application with instant communication, user presence, and modern chat UI.

projects.title: Task Manager (Kanban Board)
projects.description: Trello-inspired drag-and-drop task manager with boards, columns, and cards — powered by real-time Firebase sync.
features: Card labels, due dates, and priority levels

projects.title: Movie Discovery App
projects.description: Browse, search, and save favourite movies and TV shows using TMDB API with infinite scroll and watchlist management.
features: Search by title, genre, or release year
Infinite scroll with lazy image loading

responsibilities: Focused on performance and clean UI
